nasb.text: But Jesus, aware of their reasonings, answered and said to them, “Why are you reasoning in your hearts?

esv.text: When Jesus perceived their thoughts, he answered them, “Why do you question in your hearts?

cnv.text: 耶穌知道他們的議論，就對他們說：“你們心裡為甚麼議論呢？

ccb.text: 耶稣知道他们的想法，就问：“你们为什么心里议论呢？

csbs.text: 耶稣知道他们的意念，就对他们说：“你们心里为什么这样想呢？
